COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ANDREW WILLIAMS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

The court will sign the submitted proposed order on the appropriate Judicial Council form.
